title: Fix passing typedef value as parameter
body:
Fix of passing typedef value as parameter. Previously following code:
```verilog
class Foo #(type T);
endclass

class Bar #(type T);
endclass

typedef Bar#(string) s;

module t;
   initial begin
      $write("%s\n%s\n",$typename(Foo#(s)), $typename(Foo#(Bar#(string))));
   end
endmodule
```
generated the following output:
```
class{}Foo__Tz1
class{}Foo__Tz3
```
but after fix generates:
```
class{}Foo__Tz2
class{}Foo__Tz2
```
Type difference was caused by the fact that `Foo#(s)` was instantiated before `s`.
